label: 网格
description: 原样透传 grid：输入的整棵 DataTree 不做任何变换直接输出，branches/paths/version 全部保持不变。用于连线、分流、占位或类型标注。
description-en: Pass a grid through unchanged: the entire input DataTree is emitted as-is with no transform; branches/paths/version are all preserved. Useful for wiring, fan-out, placeholder, or type annotation.

inputs.name: value
inputs.label: 值
inputs.description: 输入 grid；整棵 DataTree 将被原样透传，不做任何修改
inputs.description-en: Input grid; the entire DataTree is passed through unchanged.

outputs.name: value
outputs.label: 值
outputs.description: 与输入完全一致的 grid（同一棵 DataTree，结构零变换）
outputs.description-en: The same grid as the input (identical DataTree, zero transform).
